meta.purpose: Market research — user pain points and authentic quotes from public forums and product reviews

quote.text: Like many, I purchased a standing desk only to sit at it 99% of the time.
quote.author: Joshua D.
quote.source_name: Ergodriven Tempo — Product Reviews

quote.text: I'd simply forget, and then realize I'd gone all day (or week) without standing.
quote.author: Riley
quote.source_name: Ergodriven Tempo — Product Reviews

quote.text: I used them all, but not as frequently as I'd like — I'd simply forget.
quote.author: Riley
quote.source_name: Ergodriven Tempo — Product Reviews

quote.text: automate the things a human forgets
quote.author: Riley
quote.source_name: Ergodriven Tempo — Product Reviews

quote.text: After years of having a standing desk, I'm finally using it because of Tempo.
quote.author: Evan
quote.source_name: Ergodriven Tempo — Product Reviews

quote.text: No brainer, just get it.
quote.author: Evan
quote.source_name: Ergodriven Tempo — Product Reviews

quote.text: Currently the only product I know that has solved this problem.
quote.author: Joshua D.
quote.source_name: Ergodriven Tempo — Product Reviews

quote.text: Now I stand at my desk 2+ hours a day, 20 minutes out of most working hours.
quote.author: Riley
quote.source_name: Ergodriven Tempo — Product Reviews

quote.text: I quickly found myself sitting all day, in spite of the fancy desk.
quote.author: David Kong
quote.source_name: Medium — How I Hacked My Standing Desk With a Raspberry Pi

quote.text: I found it strangely hard to build a habit of standing.
quote.author: David Kong
quote.source_name: Medium — How I Hacked My Standing Desk With a Raspberry Pi

quote.text: It was too easy to ignore, and too easy to say 'I'm tired right now. I'll stand in a few minutes.'
quote.author: David Kong
quote.source_name: Medium — How I Hacked My Standing Desk With a Raspberry Pi

quote.text: The healthy cadence happens automatically.
quote.author: David Kong
quote.source_name: Medium — How I Hacked My Standing Desk With a Raspberry Pi

quote.text: I'm now spending a lot more of my day standing, which has a great impact on my back pain.
quote.author: David Kong
quote.source_name: Medium — How I Hacked My Standing Desk With a Raspberry Pi

quote.text: But then I got lazy, and for the better part of the last 3 years I don't think it went into the standing position once.
quote.author: Home Automation Guy (anonymous)
quote.source_name: Home Automation Guy — Automating my IKEA Standing Desk

quote.text: I found myself spending hours just slobbing in my chair with terrible posture.
quote.author: Home Automation Guy (anonymous)
quote.source_name: Home Automation Guy — Automating my IKEA Standing Desk

quote.text: When I first got it I used to stand up most afternoons, and I found that it helped reduce my headaches and the knots in my shoulders - it was really beneficial.
quote.author: Home Automation Guy (anonymous)
quote.source_name: Home Automation Guy — Automating my IKEA Standing Desk

quote.text: This gave me the idea to create an automation that detected if I had been sitting down at my desk for too long and force me to stand up!
quote.author: Home Automation Guy (anonymous)
quote.source_name: Home Automation Guy — Automating my IKEA Standing Desk

quote.text: It works really well, and has helped me get back into the good habits that I was in before! I've felt noticeably less stiff and have had less back and shoulder pain.
quote.author: Home Automation Guy (anonymous)
quote.source_name: Home Automation Guy — Automating my IKEA Standing Desk

quote.text: How cool would it be if I can pull statistics to understand if I stand too less. (like with my manual IKEA desk that I have used twice in four years…)
quote.author: imick
quote.source_name: Home Assistant Community — Turn your LoctekMotion/FlexiSpot standing desk into a smart desk

quote.text: Unfortunately i only have a flexispot with a basic keypad that only does up and down and has no RJ45 port. has anybody ever looked into making one of those smart? could be a matter of just closing certain circuits depending on which direction you want to go?
quote.author: tombom
quote.source_name: Home Assistant Community — Turn your LoctekMotion/FlexiSpot standing desk into a smart desk

quote.text: I'm looking for desk presence detection. My desk is in my open plan living area. And I walk past my desk regularly!
quote.author: Mahko_Mahko
quote.source_name: Home Assistant Community — My first project: desk presence detection

quote.text: There is a chance that they will detect you as away if you aren't moving regularly (perhaps reading on screen etc).
quote.author: Mahko_Mahko
quote.source_name: Home Assistant Community — My first project: desk presence detection

quote.text: I have a sit-stand desk! Another reason why I was thinking about using my keyboard tray or monitor power draw [for presence detection].
quote.author: Mahko_Mahko
quote.source_name: Home Assistant Community — My first project: desk presence detection

quote.text: Having one that would encourage me to get up when I sit too long would be pretty cool.
quote.author: James F.
quote.source_name: Hackaday — Automate Your Desk With The Upsy Desky

quote.text: I've been meaning to build something like [this] already for my standing desk.
quote.author: Alan
quote.source_name: Hackaday — Automate Your Desk With The Upsy Desky

quote.text: The desk worked fine, but the controller was very basic and didn't have height presets, so I decided to make my own.
quote.author: Brad Cerasani
quote.source_name: bradcerasani.me — PiDesk

project.name: UpSy Desky
project.description: Open-source ESPHome-based controller for standing desks. Auto-raises if user sat too long, detects presence.

project.name: ha-flexispot-standing-desk
project.description: Home Assistant integration for FlexiSpot desks in MicroPython.

project.name: hackant
project.description: Control IKEA BEKANT sit/stand desk via Raspberry Pi Pico.

project.name: PiDesk
project.description: Raspberry Pi controller for IKEA BEKANT with height presets.

project.name: IKEA Idasen — Home Assistant integration
project.description: Native HA integration for IKEA Idåsen desks via Bluetooth.

project.name: Ergodriven Tempo
project.description: Commercial smart handset for standing desks — presence detection + automation. Competing product.
